title: 22 Tex. Admin. Code § 1.22 - Registration by Reciprocal Transfer
text:
(a) A
person may apply for architectural registration by reciprocal transfer if the
person holds an architectural registration that is active and in good standing
in another jurisdiction and the other jurisdiction: 
(1) has licensing or registration
requirements substantially equivalent to Texas registration requirements;
or
